scenarios.label: Tennessee river smallmouth, clear late-winter cold-front reset

expectation.seasonal_story: Late-winter clear river smallmouth should stay in subtle current-aware control with tube, hair, Ned, blade, and jerkbait lanes.

top_1_lure.why: Tube Jig fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

top_3_lures.why: Tube Jig fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Hair Jig / Marabou Jig fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Drop-Shot Worm / Minnow fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

top_1_fly.why: Sculpin Streamer fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

top_3_flies.why: Sculpin Streamer fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Woolly Bugger fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Rabbit-Strip Leech fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

color_notes: Tube Jig: Theme: green pumpkin natural. Try green pumpkin, green pumpkin blue, pb&j.
Hair Jig / Marabou Jig: Theme: natural baitfish. Try olive/white, shad, smoke shad.
Drop-Shot Worm / Minnow: Theme: green pumpkin natural. Try green pumpkin, green pumpkin blue, pb&j.
Sculpin Streamer: Theme: natural baitfish. Try olive, sculpin olive, tan/olive.
Woolly Bugger: Theme: natural baitfish. Try olive, white/olive, gray/white.
Rabbit-Strip Leech: Theme: natural baitfish. Try olive/white, shad, smoke shad.
daily_profile_notes: Variables considered: temperature_condition, pressure_regime, wind_condition, light_cloud_condition, runoff_flow_disruption
